entities.name: ISAT SYSTEM
entities.description: An ICT based Agro Advisory platform for location-specific informed decision-making

entities.name: WEATHER ADVISORIES
entities.description: Data-driven, science-based guidance provided to farmers

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Agricultural plants covered by the advisory system

entities.name: CROP GROWTH STAGES
entities.description: Specific developmental phases of crops used to tailor advisories

entities.name: SMS
entities.description: A text-based communication format for delivering advisories

entities.name: MOBILE APP
entities.description: A software application for delivering detailed advisories

entities.name: WHATSAPP
entities.description: A messaging platform used for advisory delivery

entities.name: WEBSITE
entities.description: A web-based platform for accessing advisories

entities.name: LOCAL LANGUAGES
entities.description: Regional languages used to translate advisories for better accessibility

entities.name: LOCATION-SPECIFIC INFORMATION
entities.description: Data tailored to specific geographic areas incorporated via lookup tables and direct input

entities.name: DECISION-MAKING PROCESS
entities.description: The refined logic used by the system to generate advisories aligned with farmers' needs

entities.name: DATA AVAILABILITY
entities.description: The availability of reliable and consistent data required for context-specific advisories

entities.name: GOVERNMENT POLICIES
entities.description: Regulations affecting bulk SMS and data privacy

entities.name: DATA PRIVACY
entities.description: Policies regarding the protection of user data

entities.name: USER AWARENESS
entities.description: The capacity and knowledge of users to utilize information effectively
